chunks.title: SEO and Core Web Vitals in HTML
chunks.text: First of all, I want to tell you what is SEO

chunks.title: SEO and Core Web Vitals in HTML
chunks.text: SEO stands for Search Engine Optimization

chunks.title: SEO and Core Web Vitals in HTML
chunks.text: If you see any website

chunks.title: SEO and Core Web Vitals in HTML
chunks.text: So there is SEO in it

chunks.title: SEO and Core Web Vitals in HTML

chunks.title: SEO and Core Web Vitals in HTML
chunks.text: I opened Amazon.in

chunks.title: SEO and Core Web Vitals in HTML
chunks.text: So Amazon.in will want to load this website as soon as possible

chunks.title: SEO and Core Web Vitals in HTML
chunks.text: So that their products can come in search

chunks.title: SEO and Core Web Vitals in HTML
chunks.text: Google is a search engine

chunks.title: SEO and Core Web Vitals in HTML
chunks.text: The responsibility of Google is to show the best pages to the users

chunks.title: SEO and Core Web Vitals in HTML
chunks.text: So Google will only want to show those pages

chunks.title: SEO and Core Web Vitals in HTML
chunks.text: Which will be fast

chunks.title: SEO and Core Web Vitals in HTML
chunks.text: They present very good information

chunks.title: SEO and Core Web Vitals in HTML
chunks.text: And along with that

chunks.title: SEO and Core Web Vitals in HTML
chunks.text: There are some things that the user has the best experience

chunks.title: SEO and Core Web Vitals in HTML
chunks.text: For example, let us say there are two pages

chunks.title: SEO and Core Web Vitals in HTML
chunks.text: One page has told about dog food

chunks.title: SEO and Core Web Vitals in HTML
chunks.text: The other page has also told about dog food exactly the same time

chunks.title: SEO and Core Web Vitals in HTML
chunks.text: But among these two, page 2 loads very fast

chunks.title: SEO and Core Web Vitals in HTML
chunks.text: It loads very well

chunks.title: SEO and Core Web Vitals in HTML
chunks.text: So Google will give more preference to it

chunks.title: SEO and Core Web Vitals in HTML
chunks.text: Along with that, there are core web vitals

chunks.title: SEO and Core Web Vitals in HTML
chunks.text: Which Google considers to rank two pages

chunks.title: SEO and Core Web Vitals in HTML
chunks.text: First of all, there is content

chunks.text: Content is the most important

chunks.title: SEO and Core Web Vitals in HTML
chunks.text: What is there on the page

chunks.title: SEO and Core Web Vitals in HTML
chunks.text: If your content is good

chunks.title: SEO and Core Web Vitals in HTML
chunks.text: Then maybe your website can rank without core web vitals

chunks.title: SEO and Core Web Vitals in HTML
chunks.text: But if you are competing

chunks.title: SEO and Core Web Vitals in HTML
chunks.text: With a page which has the same content

chunks.title: SEO and Core Web Vitals in HTML

chunks.title: SEO and Core Web Vitals in HTML
chunks.text: Then your core web vitals will be seen

chunks.title: SEO and Core Web Vitals in HTML
chunks.text: And if your core web vitals are good

chunks.title: SEO and Core Web Vitals in HTML
chunks.text: Then you will be given preference

chunks.title: SEO and Core Web Vitals in HTML

chunks.title: SEO and Core Web Vitals in HTML
chunks.text: And the order was completed

chunks.title: SEO and Core Web Vitals in HTML
chunks.text: But the user wanted the order not to be completed

chunks.title: SEO and Core Web Vitals in HTML
chunks.text: So he wanted to click on no

chunks.title: SEO and Core Web Vitals in HTML

chunks.title: SEO and Core Web Vitals in HTML

chunks.title: SEO and Core Web Vitals in HTML
chunks.text: This should not happen

chunks.title: SEO and Core Web Vitals in HTML
chunks.text: So our CLS should be at least less

chunks.title: SEO and Core Web Vitals in HTML
chunks.text: Now what is the definition of CLS

chunks.title: SEO and Core Web Vitals in HTML
chunks.text: Cumulative layout shift means

chunks.title: SEO and Core Web Vitals in HTML
chunks.text: How much is shifting while the page is loading

chunks.title: SEO and Core Web Vitals in HTML
chunks.text: Assume that you have loaded the page

chunks.title: SEO and Core Web Vitals in HTML
chunks.text: And first of all, you get to see this

chunks.title: SEO and Core Web Vitals in HTML
chunks.text: This was above first

chunks.title: SEO and Core Web Vitals in HTML
chunks.text: And after that, when this key term part was loaded

chunks.title: SEO and Core Web Vitals in HTML
chunks.text: So everything has shifted down

chunks.title: SEO and Core Web Vitals in HTML
chunks.text: There should not be a layout shift

chunks.title: SEO and Core Web Vitals in HTML
chunks.text: If you put width and height in images

chunks.title: SEO and Core Web Vitals in HTML
chunks.text: Then there will be no layout shift

chunks.title: SEO and Core Web Vitals in HTML
chunks.text: The next metric we are going to talk about is

chunks.title: SEO and Core Web Vitals in HTML
chunks.text: LCP

chunks.title: SEO and Core Web Vitals in HTML
chunks.text: And LCP stands for

chunks.title: SEO and Core Web Vitals in HTML
chunks.text: Adjust Contextual Paint

chunks.title: SEO and Core Web Vitals in HTML
chunks.text: This means that if the user is viewing a page

chunks.title: SEO and Core Web Vitals in HTML
chunks.text: Then the biggest element on it

chunks.title: SEO and Core Web Vitals in HTML
chunks.text: For example, the biggest part in this is this image

chunks.title: SEO and Core Web Vitals in HTML
chunks.text: How long is it loading

chunks.title: SEO and Core Web Vitals in HTML
chunks.text: Means the whole page will be loaded

chunks.title: SEO and Core Web Vitals in HTML
chunks.text: But the biggest looking element

chunks.title: SEO and Core Web Vitals in HTML
chunks.text: Which is the most important

chunks.title: SEO and Core Web Vitals in HTML
chunks.text: How long is it loading

chunks.title: SEO and Core Web Vitals in HTML
chunks.text: According to web.dev and Google

chunks.title: SEO and Core Web Vitals in HTML
chunks.text: A good LCP score should be 2.5 seconds

chunks.title: SEO and Core Web Vitals in HTML
chunks.text: That is, in 2.5 seconds

chunks.title: SEO and Core Web Vitals in HTML
chunks.text: The biggest element of the page should be loaded

chunks.title: SEO and Core Web Vitals in HTML
chunks.text: After this comes the third metric

chunks.title: SEO and Core Web Vitals in HTML
chunks.text: Which is FID

chunks.title: SEO and Core Web Vitals in HTML
chunks.text: Which stands for First Input Delay

chunks.title: SEO and Core Web Vitals in HTML
chunks.text: First Input Delay means that

chunks.title: SEO and Core Web Vitals in HTML
chunks.text: Any user

chunks.title: SEO and Core Web Vitals in HTML
chunks.text: If you click on any input element

chunks.title: SEO and Core Web Vitals in HTML
chunks.text: For example, on a button

chunks.title: SEO and Core Web Vitals in HTML
chunks.text: Or any type of input given on a page

chunks.title: SEO and Core Web Vitals in HTML
chunks.text: Then how long does that input process

chunks.title: SEO and Core Web Vitals in HTML
chunks.text: For example, if you click on a button

chunks.title: SEO and Core Web Vitals in HTML
chunks.text: Then how long does that button click browser process

chunks.title: SEO and Core Web Vitals in HTML
chunks.text: And according to Google and web.dev

chunks.title: SEO and Core Web Vitals in HTML
chunks.text: Then your input should start processing

chunks.title: SEO and Core Web Vitals in HTML
chunks.text: In less than 100 milliseconds

chunks.title: SEO and Core Web Vitals in HTML
chunks.text: Image elements do not have explicit width and height

chunks.title: SEO and Core Web Vitals in HTML
chunks.text: So you should give width and height

chunks.title: SEO and Core Web Vitals in HTML

chunks.title: SEO and Core Web Vitals in HTML
chunks.text: That should be used

chunks.title: SEO and Core Web Vitals in HTML

chunks.title: SEO and Core Web Vitals in HTML
chunks.text: When we set width and height in HTML

chunks.title: SEO and Core Web Vitals in HTML
chunks.text: Then it is reserved in this browser

chunks.title: SEO and Core Web Vitals in HTML
chunks.text: Otherwise, if we will not set height and width

chunks.title: SEO and Core Web Vitals in HTML
chunks.text: Then what will happen

chunks.title: SEO and Core Web Vitals in HTML
chunks.text: Our browser will not know how much space we have to reserve.

chunks.title: SEO and Core Web Vitals in HTML
chunks.text: And as soon as the CSS will load, the whole page will shift down.

chunks.title: SEO and Core Web Vitals in HTML
chunks.text: So we don't want our page to shift during loading time.

chunks.title: SEO and Core Web Vitals in HTML
chunks.text: If our page starts shifting, then suppose we are going to click here.

chunks.title: SEO and Core Web Vitals in HTML
chunks.text: So by mistake, when it shifts down, we might have clicked here.

chunks.title: SEO and Core Web Vitals in HTML
chunks.text: Suppose an image was going to come here.

chunks.title: SEO and Core Web Vitals in HTML
chunks.text: I am going to click here.

chunks.title: SEO and Core Web Vitals in HTML

chunks.title: SEO and Core Web Vitals in HTML

chunks.title: SEO and Core Web Vitals in HTML
chunks.text: And by mistake, instead of clicking here, I will click on the image.

chunks.title: SEO and Core Web Vitals in HTML
chunks.text: This is called cumulative layout shift.

chunks.title: SEO and Core Web Vitals in HTML
chunks.text: So this kind of shift is not preferred at all.

chunks.title: SEO and Core Web Vitals in HTML
chunks.text: Google does not prefer it at all.

chunks.title: SEO and Core Web Vitals in HTML
chunks.text: And it should be minimum.

chunks.title: SEO and Core Web Vitals in HTML
chunks.text: As you can see, this page has a very low cumulative layout shift.

chunks.title: SEO and Core Web Vitals in HTML
chunks.text: So we have to keep the cumulative layout shift minimum.

text: In today's video, we will learn about Core Web Vitals And we will learn why Core Web Vitals are important Do like this video and keep the high energy The thing is that your website should run on iPad, iPhone, Android, Surface Pro 4 All devices should run on it Because we have to give a good experience to all the users through our website In this video, we will also learn that there is a hidden tool in Chrome Which is called Lighthouse And how you can use it to enhance your website So write in the comment section below Sigma Batch OP Let's go to the computer screen Let's roll the intro So guys, I have come to my computer screen And now I will make a new folder Which is called Video 6 Video 6 And here in Video 6 I will open the VS Code as always And the thing that I am going to tell you today It will be very important from this aspect only It is very important First of all, I want to tell you what is SEO SEO stands for Search Engine Optimization If you see any website So there is SEO in it Let's take the example of Amazon.in I opened Amazon.in So Amazon.in will want to load this website as soon as possible So that their products can come in search Google is a search engine The responsibility of Google is to show the best pages to the users So Google will only want to show those pages Which will be fast They present very good information And along with that There are some things that the user has the best experience For example, let us say there are two pages One page has told about dog food The other page has also told about dog food exactly the same time But among these two, page 2 loads very fast It loads very well So Google will give more preference to it Along with that, there are core web vitals Which Google considers to rank two pages First of all, there is content Content is the most important What is there on the page If your content is good Then maybe your website can rank without core web vitals But if you are competing With a page which has the same content Has presented content of almost similar quality Then your core web vitals will be seen And if your core web vitals are good Then you will be given preference So in core web vitals First of all, your CLS comes You see this video here Which I have run from the web.dev website You will see that someone comes to your website And he is here to cancel the order And by mistake, as soon as he canceled This thing above became visible And he shifted the layout And the order was completed But the user wanted the order not to be completed So he wanted to click on no In this case, the user experience is very bad And as you have seen in this video This should not happen So our CLS should be at least less Now what is the definition of CLS Cumulative layout shift means How much is shifting while the page is loading Assume that you have loaded the page And first of all, you get to see this This was above first And after that, when this key term part was loaded So everything has shifted down There should not be a layout shift If you put width and height in images Then there will be no layout shift The next metric we are going to talk about is LCP And LCP stands for Adjust Contextual Paint This means that if the user is viewing a page Then the biggest element on it For example, the biggest part in this is this image How long is it loading Means the whole page will be loaded But the biggest looking element Which is the most important How long is it loading According to web.dev and Google A good LCP score should be 2.5 seconds That is, in 2.5 seconds The biggest element of the page should be loaded After this comes the third metric Which is FID Which stands for First Input Delay First Input Delay means that Any user If you click on any input element For example, on a button Or any type of input given on a page Then how long does that input process For example, if you click on a button Then how long does that button click browser process And according to Google and web.dev Then your input should start processing In less than 100 milliseconds So these were three core web vitals Which are very important For your information These core web vitals are also updated But these three are very important And you should know Now I will show you What is a lighthouse report And why do you generate it And these three core web vitals How will you get the value from there So let me tell you here If you right-click and inspect And you may be coming to the right side Then you can bring it down by clicking here By clicking here If you want, you can bring it back here And by clicking here You can bring it down I prefer it down Because I have a habit To see it down from the start Now here you see You are getting to see the option of lighthouse Lighthouse basically generates a report for you And tells you What can be improved in your HTML page For example, if I want to see here on mobile How is my website looking to mobile users So I will click on mobile Or I will click on desktop I will close this tab I will click on mobile And here I will click on analyze page load So it will generate a report for me Lighthouse You can see here That a report has been generated In this performance, accessibility Best practices, SEO and PWA All these things are being shown Now here you can see That some things are shown here in red That is, there is a scope of improvement on the page Now here you see It is telling you to size your images properly 2.7 seconds Your website can be loaded fast Now here you can see That there are some suggestions That are given to you Through lighthouse And if you incorporate these suggestions Then your website will load very well And the user will get good experience Now you can see here It is written here Image elements do not have explicit width and height So you should give width and height The width and height attribute of the image Which we had read in the last video That should be used So that it gets reserved in your browser When we set width and height in HTML Then it is reserved in this browser Otherwise, if we will not set height and width Then what will happen Our browser will not know how much space we have to reserve. And as soon as the CSS will load, the whole page will shift down. So we don't want our page to shift during loading time. If our page starts shifting, then suppose we are going to click here. So by mistake, when it shifts down, we might have clicked here. Suppose an image was going to come here. I am going to click here. And as soon as I clicked, this image got loaded. And all the content shifted down. And by mistake, instead of clicking here, I will click on the image. This is called cumulative layout shift. So this kind of shift is not preferred at all. Google does not prefer it at all. And it should be minimum. As you can see, this page has a very low cumulative layout shift. So we have to keep the cumulative layout shift minimum. So that our user can get a very good experience. So here we get a lot of suggestions. And this is for our mobile. Now we can generate a desktop report. And that desktop report will be generated. So as you can see, it has generated a report. 92 marks in performance. 82 out of 100 in accessibility. 75 out of 75 in best practices. Now see here. All the good things have been told here. And all the scope of improvements Lighthouse tells you. So this is a hidden tool that you should all use. Now I want to tell you about meta tags and meta descriptions. So what I will do here is that I will create a new file. I will name it index.html. And after creating an HTML file, the first SEO element that I want to tell you is title. If your title is reflecting the content of your page, then this is a very good SEO practice.
